overall.description: A cinematic scene from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) depicting a food vendor at a covered market stall. The perspective starts at a cooking station where the character stir-fries food in a large wok, then moves around the stall to approach customers waiting at a glass counter in a futuristic cyberpunk marketplace with metal framework roofing and neon lighting.

events.description: cook stops stirring the wok and begins to step away from the cooking station

agents.ego_description: actively cooking and stirring food in a large wok with a metal ladle, occasionally scooping to check the food

entered.detail: large round cooking pan containing noodles or rice being stir-fried over heat
long-handled metal spatula used for stirring and tossing the food
geometric black metal beam structure forming the roof of the market with triangular patterns
stacks of white ceramic plates ready for serving customers
illuminated glass cabinet showing prepared food items and ingredients
illuminated hanging sign with menu items visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a food stall cooking station where the ego character is actively stir-frying food in a large metal wok. The environment is a covered market with an industrial metal framework roof allowing partial daylight to filter through. Stacks of plates sit to the left while a glass display case is visible to the right. The character uses a large ladle to continuously stir the food until they stop and step away from the station.

events.description: camera begins moving away from the cooking station and circles around the stall
camera rounds the corner of the stall revealing the front customer service area

agents.ego_description: walking around the food stall from the cooking area toward the front counter where customers are waiting

notable_agents.action: cook character moving away from the station toward the back of the stall

entered.detail: metal and glass counter top separating the service area from the customer space

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the cooking station and begins circling around the stall, transitioning from the back preparation area to the front service counter. The metal framework roof remains overhead while the glass display case comes into central view. The cook moves toward the background as the camera navigates around the counter edge, revealing more of the market environment and other stalls in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: customer service counter at market stall

events.description: camera approaches two customers standing at the counter, revealing their detailed cyberpunk-style appearance and tattoos

agents.ego_description: approaching the front counter to face the customers waiting to order, focusing on their interactions

notable_agents.action: customer with orange hair and facial tattoos looking at a handheld device while waiting at the counter
customer in colorful vest with green and orange patterns adjusting their clothing and looking at the menu

entered.detail: several white plates with prepared food arranged on the glass counter for customers
small containers, napkins, and utensils arranged on the counter surface

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the front counter where two customers are waiting. The customer with distinctive orange hair and tattoos stands center frame looking at a device, while another customer in a colorful vest stands to the left. Prepared food plates are visible on the glass counter to the right. The industrial metal roof structure remains overhead as the scene focuses on the customer interaction area of the cyberpunk market stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the heat of a cooking station to the customer service area of a futuristic market stall. It begins with a first-person view of stir-frying food in a large metal wok beneath an industrial framework roof, with stacks of plates and a glass display case framing the workspace. As the cook steps away, the camera circles around the stall, shifting from the back preparation area toward the front service counter while revealing the broader cyberpunk marketplace and neighboring stalls in the background. The scene then opens up to the front counter, where the focus shifts to two waiting customers, including one with orange hair and tattoos, standing beside prepared food plates. Finally, the movement settles on the interaction area, with the metal roof structure remaining overhead as the camera completes its approach to the patrons.
